title: tigridia ehrenbergii
intro: Tigridia ehrenbergii, also known as the Mexican tiger flower or butterfly flower, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of Tigridia ehrenbergii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to combat infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. The herbal preparation of Tigridia ehrenbergii involves using its flowers and leaves in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
